last_commit.author: Marcoraza
last_commit.message:
feat: Notion data layer + ChatPanel infrastructure

- lib/dataProvider.ts: DataProvider<T> interface + 12 typed interfaces
- contexts/NotionDataContext.tsx: centralized 30s polling, sequential fetch
- components/ui/SyncBadge.tsx: auto-refresh sync indicator
- hooks/useAgentChat.ts: IndexedDB-persisted chat sessions
- components/ChatPanel.tsx: Framer Motion drawer overlay
- data/db.ts: chat_sessions store (v7 reset for clean seed)
- data/types/chat.ts: ChatMessage + ChatSession types
- App.tsx: wrapped with NotionDataProvider
- AppSidebar: Planejador→Projetos, Gestão de Contatos→Network
- public/data/*.json: 12 Notion sync JSONs
- CLAUDE.md: updated with UX patterns + DB IDs

No UI components modified. All existing views unchanged.
